untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of multi-day consolidation base formation (90+ day range identification) and breakout threshold (3% above base upper boundary). These require custom pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicators. Specifically: (1) identifying base upper/lower boundaries over a 120-day lookback period, (2) confirming 90+ day consolidation duration, (3) calculating 3% breakout threshold from identified base boundary. The Donchian channel (dc_upper) approximates recent highs but does not capture the historical base formation logic. Volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 is translatable but incomplete without base boundary detection.
translation_notes: Partial translation: Used dc_upper to approximate the 'upper boundary of base' and vol_ratio_20 as volume confirmation. However, the core signal logic—identifying a consolidation base over 90+ days and measuring a 3% breakout from that base—requires custom pattern recognition beyond standard indicators. Entry conditions simplified to: price breaks above recent highs (dc_upper proxy) with volume confirmation. Exit uses close below dc_upper as reversal signal. Trailing stop of 8% below highest point translated to stop_loss_pct. Time-based exit of 180 days captured in hold_days_max.
